remarks: FULLY ACTIVE, BUYER UNABLE TO SECURE FINANCING--Tucked away at the end of a peaceful N. Stamford cul-de-sac, this exceptional home lives like a private retreat-where luxury, comfort & privacy come together in perfect balance. Surrounded by mature trees and professionally designed landscape lighting, the property offers a truly serene, resort-like setting day and night. Step inside to sunlit, beautifully appointed interiors featuring hardwood floors, custom millwork, and thoughtfully designed spaces. The chef's kitchen is stunning and functional, with premium appliances including a Sub-Zero, double ovens, warming drawer, and an oversized walk-in pantry-ideal for everyday living and elevated entertaining alike. The home's layout flows effortlessly from room to room, with a formal dining space for memorable gatherings and a study or a perfect home office. Luxury window treatments throughout add warmth, texture, and a polished finish. The primary suite is a true haven, featuring a spa-inspired bath with soaking tub, glass-enclosed rain shower, dual vanities, and two walk-in closets. The walk-out lower level enhances the lifestyle experience with a professional wine cellar, flexible recreation space, and dedicated workshop. Outdoors, experience resort-like living with an expansive deck, charming gazebo, & a privately positioned ThermoSpa hot tub-creating the perfect setting for relaxation under the stars. More than a home-it's a refined escape, offering an exceptional lifestyle
